title: Paid Settlement Delivery Entry
description: Schema for a delivery row produced by SettlementDeliveryService after transmitting a settled ledger to an accounting system (SFTP or API). Records adapter used, delivery status, checksum, ACK timestamp, and retry attempts. See PAID-06.

delivery_id.description: Unique delivery identifier. Prefix del_, followed by 12 hex chars of SHA256(settlement_id|adapter|timestamp).

adapter.description: Accounting adapter used for this delivery.

status.description: pending: queued; delivering: in-flight; delivered: sent, awaiting ACK; acked: externally acknowledged; failed: transient error (retryable); failed_permanent: DLQ — max retries exhausted.

delivery_idempotency_key.description: Idempotency key used to deduplicate delivery requests for the same settlement + adapter pair.

delivered_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the ledger was successfully sent.

acked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when an external ACK was received via POST /settlement-ack.

checksum.description: SHA256 hex digest of the ledger payload (CSV or JSON) that was transmitted. Used by auditors to verify integrity.

attempts.description: Number of delivery attempts made (including the initial attempt).

last_error.description: Last error message if the delivery failed. Null on success.

notes.description: Operator notes or automated delivery commentary.
